jedis.signature: List<Long> hpexpire(byte[] key, long milliseconds, byte[]... fields)

lettuce_sync.signature: List<Long> hpexpire(K key, long milliseconds, K... fields)

params.name: key
params.description: the key.

params.name: milliseconds
params.description: the milliseconds.

params.name: fields
params.description: one or more fields to set the TTL for.

returns.description: a list of Long values for each of the fields provided: 2 indicating the specific field is deleted already due to expiration, or provided expiry interval is 0; 1 indicating expiration time is set/updated; 0 indicating the expiration time is not set (a provided NX | XX | GT | LT condition is not met); -2 indicating there is no such field @since 6.4

_group_: hash, * - _complexity_: O(N) where N is the number of fields returned, * - _since_: 6.2.0, */, hrandfield(, key: RedisKey, callback?: Callback<string | unknown[] | null>)

nredisstack_sync.signature: HashFieldExpire(RedisKey key, RedisValue[] hashFields, TimeSpan expiry, ExpireWhen when = ExpireWhen.Always, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the hash.

params.name: hashFields
params.description: The fields in the hash to set expire time.

params.name: expiry
params.description: The exact date to expiry to set.

params.name: when
params.description: under which condition the expiration will be set using ExpireWhen.

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: Empty array if the key does not exist. Otherwise, returns an array where each item is the result of operation for given fields: <list type="table"> <listheader> <term>Result</term> <description>Description</description> </listheader> <item> <term>2</term> <description>Field deleted because the specified expiration time is due.</description> </item> <item> <term>1</term> <description>Expiration time set/updated.</description> </item> <item> <term>0</term> <description>Expiration time is not set/update (a specified ExpireWhen condition is not met).</description> </item> <item> <term>-1</term> <description>No such field exists.</description> </item> </list>

redis_rb.signature: hpexpire(key, ttl, *fields, nx: nil, xx: nil, gt: nil, lt: nil)

params.name: nx
params.description: Set expiry only when the key has no expiry.

params.name: xx
params.description: Set expiry only when the key has an existing expiry.

params.name: gt
params.description: Set expiry only when the new expiry is greater than current one.

params.name: lt
params.description: Set expiry only when the new expiry is less than current one.

returns.description: Feedback on if the fields have been updated
